pi_items.source: Flight Crew View help documentation mentions flight status, flight changes, and flights as core notification types
Flight Crew View help documentation lists gate changes, aircraft swaps, delays, and cancellations as alert types sent to users
Flight Crew View help documentation mentions 'flight status' and 'inbound information' as notification content
Flight Crew View help documentation explicitly lists 'Gate changes' and 'Aircraft swaps' as notification types
Flight Crew View app includes Crew Chat feature. Help documentation mentions Crew Chat category in notification settings
Flight Crew View help documentation mentions messages in context of Crew Chat notifications
App name is 'Flight Crew View', and main features include 'Crew Chat' and 'Crew Assistant' which are core notification sources
Word 'urgent' does not appear in Flight Crew View official help documentation, app description, or features list
Task description line 5 explicitly states: 'Create a file at /sdcard/notification_config.txt listing the final state of each channel'
Verified on Google Play Store and multiple APK distribution sites; Flight Crew View official app
Confirmed on Google Play Store, official website (flightcrewview.com), and Help Center (help.flightcrewview.com)

privileged_info_summary: Flight Crew View (com.robert.fcView) is a real, publicly available Android app for pilots and flight attendants. The app has notification features for flight-critical information including flight status, alerts for gate changes, aircraft swaps, delays, and cancellations, as well as Crew Chat messaging. The task requires users to configure notification channels, keeping flight-critical notifications enabled (identified by keywords: flight, alert, status, change, chat, message, crew) while disabling non-essential channels. The expected output file is /sdcard/notification_config.txt. One keyword ('urgent') in the critical_keywords list could not be verified in official documentation. The APK used in the task is the actual Flight Crew View app from Google Play, not synthetic data.
